sentiment.reasoning: Investor days are routine corporate events that rarely provide immediate material financial impact.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business maintenance and do not imply immediate financial shifts.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
